message:
feat(fcp-host): Add test connector binary and integration tests

Add infrastructure for testing fcp-host discovery and introspection against
real subprocess connectors:

fcp-test-connector Binary:
- Add crates/fcp-host/src/bin/fcp-test-connector.rs
- Implements a minimal MCP-compliant test connector
- Responds to handshake, introspection, and invoke requests
- Configurable via FCP_TEST_CONNECTOR_ID environment variable
- Designed for use in integration test harnesses

Integration Tests:
- Add crates/fcp-host/tests/host_connector_integration.rs
- Tests connector discovery flow with subprocess connectors
- Verifies introspection and capability reporting
- Uses fcp-e2e::ConnectorProcessRunner for subprocess management
- Implements AllowAllPolicy for test isolation

This enables testing the full fcp-host stack against realistic connector
subprocesses rather than mocked interfaces.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
